pageContext.name: The Holiday Maid Monica Tesia (White Version)
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Gantaku Anime are proud to bring you The Holiday Maid Monica Tesia (White Version) Statue!  Presented in highly detailed 1:4 scale, this stunning variation of Monica was crafted with an all-white color scheme, allowing for the brief instances of color in her skin tone and accessories to positively shine against a neutral yet angelic background. Gold embellishments on the banister which she greets you from, simply add to her charm!  A beautiful addition to any collection, be sure to invite Monica home today!
